bio:
"Cashew, now our cat, was admitted to the clinic I was working in November 2024, where he stayed with us for three weeks while being treated for a severe respiratory infection caused by Mycoplasma in combination with Calicivirus. During his hospitalization, something very special happened: we formed a beautiful bond.
This little cat, then known as Pascale, completely stole my heart. ❤️ After many thoughtful family conversations, we decided to adopt him. To support the JLT Dream Team community, I offered to cover his veterinary expenses as a small way of giving back and thanking them for the incredible work they do caring for stray cats.
His new name, Cashew, was chosen by my children. From the very beginning, he adapted wonderfully to our family. It truly feels as though he has always belonged with us.
We are so happy with the decision we made and Cashew seems just as happy. He has formed a particularly special bond with the kids, and watching their connection grow has been incredibly heartwarming! 🥰
Sometimes the patients who come into our lives leave with much more than treatment - they leave with our hearts."
